series_metadata.series_description: a) Purpose of this file is to provide reference in checking or investigating the horsemen. b) The applications contain the description, arrest record, address, horses owned, and various other information that is pertinent to this commission. This file is used daily by the office personnel.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Current and 1 previous year unless application is transferred hearing file. ; Electronic: Current and 1 previous years unless application is transferred hearing file
